name: Jarvis Configuration Template
description: Template for projects to reference Jarvis AI instructions
usage: Copy this file to your project root and customize the 'extends' section to reference the Jarvis instructions you need

project-specific-rules: Add your project-specific AI instructions here
These will override or extend the Jarvis instructions
Example: 'Focus on meal planning and recipe management'
Example: 'Use TypeScript for type safety throughout'

overrides.description: Use this section to override specific Jarvis instructions

example.standards.code-style: Use 4 spaces instead of 2 for indentation in this project

project-specific-rules: Follow React best practices for state management
